title: Brazilian Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine, made with chicken breast, stir-fried vegetables, and a hint of cumin.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the skillet.
Add the chopped onion, bell pepper, and tomato to the skillet.
Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Return the chicken breast to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
